title: Mekanism Fluxified
body:
**Part of the Fluxified Mod Series.**

If your tried of different power names that are all "Forge Energy" then this is the mod for you

Mekanism Fluxified is an addon for Mekanismthat visually changes the Mekanism Power Bars from Green Joules to Redish Redstone Flux.

I've been using BisectHosting for all my server hosting needs, and I couldn't be happier. New customers can get 25% off their first month with furtabs, and their support team is always available to provide excellent assistance.
